script.code: fn respond(ctx) { let count = ctx.state.incr_by("count", 1); http(200, #{engine: "rhai", count: count}) }

responses.inject: function (config, state) { state.count = (state.count || 0) + 1; return { statusCode: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ engine: 'javascript', count: state.count }) }; }

function (config, state) { var req = config.request || config; return { statusCode: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ engine: 'javascript', method: req.method, path: req.path, body: req.body }) }; }

stubs.name: Health — lists the engines this imposter exercises
